Title: How GitHub uses eBPF to improve deployment safety
Author: Lawrence Gripper
Description:
Learn how Github uses eBPF to detect and prevent circular dependencies in its deployment tooling.

The post [How GitHub uses eBPF to improve deployment safety](https://github.blog/engineering/infrastructure/how-github-uses-ebpf-to-improve-deployment-safety/) appeared first on [The GitHub Blog](https://github.blog).
